params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Dine (dining). Focus tightly on: dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, round oak dining table, woven rattan pendant, bay windows unobstructed, 4 linen chairs, woven rattan pendant (visible cord/fixture), 4 linen-upholstered chairs, single ceramic vase. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, uncluttered Japandi interior that balances Scandinavian restraint with Japanese warmth. Warm neutrals, light oak, and sculptural minimal furniture create a grounded, family-friendly environment. Prioritize a cozy standing-desk work corner in the main living area, low-profile seating, and textured natural materials. Maintain visible-source lighting logic and faithful architecture in all outputs. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
